name: Adversarial Review Fixes
goal: Fix 8 findings (FW-1 through FW-9, excluding FW-8) from the full-week blind adversarial review. DO NOT PUSH.

tasks.name: FW-1+FW-2: Shadow Grader Path Validation Fix
tasks.description: Fix _validate_path to use realpath (resolves symlinks) and os.sep-aware containment (prevents prefix collision). TDD: 2 new tests first, then fix.

steps.description: Add test_path_prefix_collision_rejected and test_symlink_outside_allowed_roots_rejected to TestExecuteTool in test_shadow_grader.py
Run new tests to verify they fail (RED)
steps.expected: FAIL — current code uses startswith without os.sep and abspath without symlink resolution

steps.description: Fix _validate_path: abspath→realpath, startswith→== root or startswith(root+os.sep), /tmp/→/tmp
Run all shadow grader tests to verify (GREEN)
steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_shadow_grader.py -v

tasks.name: FW-3+FW-4: Complexity Gate Success Check Fix
tasks.description: Fix complexity gate substring bug: replace 'success' not in obj_lower with regex \bsuccess\s*: check. TDD: 1 new test first, then fix. Existing test_passes_open_ended_verb_with_success already uses Success: pattern and needs no update.

steps.description: Run new test to verify it fails (RED)
Fix regex at line 1751: replace '"success" not in obj_lower' with 'not re.search(r'\bsuccess\s*:', obj_lower)'

tasks.name: FW-5: validate_safe_id Regression Test
tasks.description: Create tests/test_protocol.py with 2 regression tests for validate_safe_id: accepts valid IDs and rejects newline-containing IDs (guards \Z anchor).

steps.description: Create commander/tests/test_protocol.py with TestValidateSafeId class containing test_accepts_valid_id and test_rejects_newline
Run tests to verify they pass (testing existing behavior, no RED phase)
steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_protocol.py -v

tasks.name: FW-7: Fallback Timeout Tuple Fix
tasks.description: Fix both _chat_via_fallback (line 84) and _post_via_fallback (line 177) to use timeout tuple (self._connect_timeout, self._timeout) matching primary paths. TDD: add timeout assertions to both fallback tests first.

steps.description: Run updated tests to verify they fail (RED)
steps.expected: FAIL — fallback passes timeout=30 (int), not timeout=(2, 30) (tuple)

steps.command: cd commander && PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python -m pytest tests/test_ollama_client.py -v

tasks.name: FW-9: Summarization Model Constant Extraction
tasks.description: Extract _DEFAULT_SUMMARIZATION_MODEL = 'gemma4:9b' at module level, replace both occurrences at lines 2794 and 2799. No tests required: pure refactor with no behavior change.

steps.description: Add _DEFAULT_SUMMARIZATION_MODEL = 'gemma4:9b' near top of orchestrator_mcp.py with other module-level constants
Run ListClaudeSessions tests to verify no regression

tasks.name: FW-6: Plan JSON Absolute Path Cleanup
tasks.description: Replace 20 instances of /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude/commander with relative cd commander && form in shadow-grader.plan.json. No tests required: data file cleanup.

steps.description: Replace all instances of /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude/commander with relative path form

tasks.name: Full Test Suite Verification
tasks.description: Run complete test suite to verify zero regressions across all fixes. No tests required: verification-only task.

steps.expected: ALL tests pass. Zero failures, zero errors.
7 files changed (5 source/test files + 1 new test file + 1 data file)
